scope: Verification of the 'View Job' button functionality within the conversational AI careersite, ensuring correct job details are displayed when clicked.

testCases.title: Verify 'View Job' redirects to valid job details page - Positive Case
steps: Initiate a chat session with the Convert chatbot.
Search for a job using a valid keyword (e.g., 'Sales Agent').
Locate a job listing in the search results.
Click the 'View Job' button associated with the job listing.
testCases.expectedResult: The user is redirected to a dedicated job details page with accurate information for the selected job. The URL should not contain '0' as a job ID.

testCases.title: Verify 'View Job' handling of jobs with no details - Negative Case
steps: Initiate a chat session with the Convert chatbot.
Search for a job using a keyword that may return jobs with incomplete data.
Locate a job listing in the search results.
Click the 'View Job' button associated with the job listing.
testCases.expectedResult: The system displays a user-friendly error message indicating that job details are unavailable, instead of redirecting to a page with a '0' ID or a broken page.  The user remains on the current page or is redirected to a relevant help/error page.

testCases.title: Verify 'View Job' button functionality after multiple searches - Edge Case
steps: Initiate a chat session with the Convert chatbot.
Search for a job using a keyword (e.g., 'Data Scientist').
Click the 'View Job' button for a job listing.
Navigate back to the chat interface.
Search for a different job using a new keyword (e.g., 'Marketing Manager').
Click the 'View Job' button for a job listing.
testCases.expectedResult: The user is correctly redirected to the job details page for the second job listing. The URL should not contain '0' as a job ID. The functionality remains consistent across multiple searches.

testCases.title: Verify 'View Job' button behavior with long job titles - Edge Case
steps: Initiate a chat session with the Convert chatbot.
Search for a job using a keyword that returns jobs with exceptionally long titles.
Locate a job listing with a long title.
Click the 'View Job' button associated with the job listing.
testCases.expectedResult: The 'View Job' button redirects to the job details page without any display issues caused by the long job title. The URL should not contain '0' as a job ID. The job title is displayed correctly on the details page.

testCases.title: Verify 'View Job' button is disabled when no jobs are found - Negative Case
steps: Initiate a chat session with the Convert chatbot.
Search for a job using a keyword that returns no results.
Observe the search results area.
testCases.expectedResult: The 'View Job' button is not displayed or is disabled for any job listings, as no jobs are available. A 'No jobs found' message is displayed.
